content.en:
The information about the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead and the Extradimensional Origin Bead is naturally difficult to obtain, even the Garan Chamber of Commerce will not sell this kind of intelligence, they are only trading, not a specialized intelligence sales organization.

However, Ye Tian has also been in the Extreme Yang Realm for a long time, and he also has a certain understanding of the forces in the Extreme Yang Realm, including those who specialize in selling intelligence.

【Peep Pavilion】

This force specializes in the business of selling intelligence, and in addition to selling intelligence, it also takes over some assassination, protection, and other businesses.

It can be said that the Sky Voyeur Pavilion is a force in the darkness, but their strength is very strong, there are quite a few extradimensional realms alone, and their strength is all over the Six Thousand Territory and many other territories, and ordinary extradimensional forces do not dare to provoke them at all.

Moreover, they have too much secret information, as long as they don't provoke some overlord-level extradimensional forces, they won't cause trouble.

Therefore, the Sky Pavilion exists to this day.

......

The Extreme Yang Realm, a hidden void.

There is a small city here, the Blood Hidden City, which is a secret trading place, and a branch of the Peep Heaven Pavilion is hidden here.

Soon, Ye Tian entered the Peep Heaven Pavilion branch.

Of course, he casually copied the body of a half-step extradimensional realm and entered here.

In this way, even if his identity is exposed later, he will not be able to find 743 on him.

Of course, he did something to hide.

The reason why he came here as another half-step transcendent realm was that Peeping Heaven Pavilion was not a good thing after all, and if he bought information, he might be sold by Peeping Heaven Pavilion in the blink of an eye.

After entering the Peep Heaven Pavilion branch, a peak realm god entertained Ye Tian.

"I want to buy information about the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead and the Extradimensional Origin Bead, where can there be such treasures!" Ye Tian asked.

Many half-step extradimensional realms want to buy this kind of information, so the peak realm gods of the Sky Voyeur Pavilion know this kind of information, and they don't need to inquire about it.

"Rough information 1 million super Wei Bao coins, detailed information 10 million super Wei Bao coins, complete information 100 million super Wei Bao coins!"

The peak realm god of the Heavenly Pavilion said.

The Super Dimension Treasure Coin is a currency similar to the Garan Treasure Coins, except that the Gala Treasure Coin can only be used in the Garan Chamber of Commerce, while the Super Dimension Treasure Coin can be popular in the entire Six Thousand Territory.

It's just that the Super Dimensional Treasure Coin needs to be refined by a strong person in the Super Dimensional Realm using special materials (cafi), which is very time-consuming and energy-consuming, and in the Extreme Yang Realm, many big forces have channels to exchange for Super Dimensional Treasure Coins.

Similarly, Peep Heaven Pavilion also has an exchange business.

"I want complete information!"

Ye Tian also knew that he couldn't save in terms of intelligence, although the 100 million super dimensional treasure coins were very high, it was worth it if he could obtain the super dimensional origin bead and the immortal golden marrow bead for himself.

However, he is very poor now, and he does not have 100 million super dimensional treasure coins, and he has nothing left on him except for the fragments of super dimensional dao soldiers.

Therefore, he had only one way to get together the Super Dimension Treasure Coins.

"Peep Sky Pavilion also has an acquisition business, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes, but this is not our main business, so we don't accept ordinary treasures, only high-value and rare items, we want. "Peeping into the Heavenly Pavilion Peak Realm Divine Dao.

"So, what about the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Inheritance? Do you want it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You have the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Inheritance???"

The Heaven Seeping Pavilion Peak Realm God was shocked.

The value of the top-level super-dimensional Dao inheritance is not high, and it is everywhere, but the perfect super-dimensional Dao inheritance is different, and the value far exceeds that of the top-level super-dimensional Dao inheritance.

"Yes, what price can you offer?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You have to ask for advice. "Peeping into the Heavenly Pavilion Peak Realm Divine Dao.

"Okay, then please go up!" Ye Tian waited here.

An extremely terrifying existence in the Sky Seeping Pavilion has arrived.

"It's an extradimensional realm!!!"

Ye Tian realized that he seemed to underestimate the value of the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species!

He only knew that in the Six Thousand Territory, there were many Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species, and many powerful extradimensional forces had them, but they still underestimated their value.

Of course, the perfect extradimensional Dao seed he was going to shoot this time was not the Shimapan Dao Seed, but the Perfect Superdimensional Dao Seed inheritance that he had created not long ago.

There is a limit to the number of times the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Seed Inheritance can be made, so he is idle and has nothing to do, allowing another copy body to keep deducing and creating a new Perfect Extradimensional Dao Inheritance.

This new Perfect Extra-Dimensional Dao Seed Inheritance was named the Extreme Yang Dao Seed by him, after all, it was created after browsing the many Extra-Dimensional Dao Seed Inheritances in the Extreme Yang Realm, so it was named this.

After the arrival of the extra-dimensional realm of the Peep Heaven Pavilion, he smiled and said: "Hello, I am the Lord of the Xuhai Realm of the Peep Heaven Pavilion, you have a perfect super-dimensional Dao inheritance, I don't know how many times you can pass it on?"

"It is a complete and perfect extradimensional Dao inheritance, and it can be passed on nine times. "

Ye Tian said. []

"Nine times!"

The Xuhai Realm Lord showed excitement, and immediately spoke: "In this way, we can bid 50 billion super dimensional treasure coins to buy your super dimensional Dao inheritance, how about it?"

"I want 100 billion super dimensional treasure coins!"

Ye Tian increased the price, he felt that the Xuhai Realm Lord would definitely be willing.

"No problem!"

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm agreed.

Seeing this, Ye Tian immediately knew that he was still underestimating the value of the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species, maybe he asked for 200 billion Superdimensional Treasure Coins, and the other party would agree.

However, he did not dare to ask for too much.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the Extreme Yang Dao Seed Inheritance and handed it to the Xuhai Realm Lord, and the Xuhai Realm Lord also gave Ye Tian 100 billion super-dimensional treasure coins, and also gave away the complete information of the Super-Dimensional Origin Bead and the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead for free.

The transaction was completed, and Ye Tian came out of the Peep Heaven Pavilion.

However, he knew very well that the Peeping Heaven Pavilion would never let him go, but it was not easy to do it in the Peeping Heaven Pavilion, and the pavilion master of the Peeping Heaven Pavilion would not allow the Over-Dimensional Realm of the Peeping Heaven Pavilion to do anything to him internally.

But once you leave here, you will inevitably attack him.

100 billion super dimensional treasure coins is also a great wealth for the super dimensional realm!

In order to be able to get out of the way with these treasures safely, Ye Tian's other copy body passed by him in the Blood Hidden City as another half-step superdimensional realm, and secretly took away the space items containing 100 billion superdimensional treasure coins.

Then, the replica body left the Blood Hidden City again, and the replica body was constantly changed in the middle to ensure that there would be no problems.

After some transfer, Ye Tian took these super dimensional treasure coins directly away from this territory and returned to the mansion of Broken Void City again.

At this time, the Xu Hai Realm Lord of the Blood Hidden City Snooping Pavilion Branch was still tracking Ye Tian.
